name: Citrus Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 oranges - peel off pith and remove fruit segments
3 lemons - peel off pith and remove fruit segments
2 grapefruits - peel off pith and remove fruit segments
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the orange, lemon, and grapefruit sections with the peppers, mint, shallots, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
2. Mix well and season to taste.
3. Serve atop your favorite fish.
Yield: 1 1/2 cups salsa
